allow: PowerShell(try { $r = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/src/App.tsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "STATUS: $\($r.StatusCode\); LEN: $\($r.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERR: $_" }; try { $r2 = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:5174/src/pages/ButtonPage.tsx" -UseBasicParsing -TimeoutSec 10; "STATUS BUTTON: $\($r2.StatusCode\); LEN: $\($r2.Content.Length\)" } catch { "ERR BUTTON: $_" })
